sections.paragraph:
Original: יבוּסי

Transliteration: yebûsı̂y

Phonetic: yeb-oo-see'

BDB Definition:

Jebusite = "descendants of Jebus"
  1. descendants of the 3rd son of Canaan who lived in or around the site of Jebus, the early name for Jerusalem

Origin: from H2982

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
